news.title: Elon Musk's Memphis AI empire is the epicenter of the data center backlash
news.summary: Data center-related policy proposals, protests and litigation are underway across the country citing Colossus and Memphis as a cautionary tale.

news.title: Alphabet shares fall on report its most powerful AI model Gemini 3.5 Pro is delayed
news.summary: Alphabet announced the Gemini 3.5 Pro AI  in May, saying it was being used internally but wouldn't be ready for a broader rollout until the following month.

news.title: 3 of our stocks rode the AI rally, while 3 others fell out of favor since last month
news.summary: Ahead of the CNBC Investing Club's July Monthly Meeting, here's a look at what moved our three top and bottom performers since our last meeting.

news.title: Nvidia-backed Fireworks hits $17.5 billion valuation as companies pursue cheaper AI models
news.summary: Fireworks once relied heavily on revenue from coding startup Cursor, but has diversified in the past year as more companies reach for lower-cost AI models.

news.title: Grocery sales, United earnings, Anthropic's IPO prep and more in Morning Squawk
news.summary: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.

news.title: Nvidia unveils new AI model and expands Japan’s physical AI ecosystem
news.summary: Nvidia announces new AI model, Cosmos 3 Edge, and expansion of its physical AI ecosystems in Japan.

news.title: TSMC to invest additional $100 billion in Arizona after second-quarter profit soars 77%
news.summary: TSMC announced a second-quarter profit, following its June revenue figures released earlier this week.

news.title: Alibaba and Baidu shares jump in Hong Kong on Apple AI partnership
news.summary: The technological rivalry between China and the U.S. has intensified, as they race for AI dominance.

news.title: Midnight social media curfew and limits to infinite scrolling proposed for older UK teens
news.summary: The U.K. government has proposed new measures to protect older teens on social media, including a midnight curfew and a limit to infinite scrolling.

news.title: Netflix Feeds Investor Anxiety With Disappointing Forecast
news.summary: Netflix Inc. forecast a second consecutive quarter of slowing sales growth, contributing to investor anxiety about the streaming giant’s future. The company projected revenue of $12.9 billion in the current quarter and earnings of 82 cents a share, both a little shy of analysts’ expectations.

news.title: Tech Stocks Drag S&P 500 Lower as TSMC Results Spur AI Concerns
news.summary: Technology stocks pushed major US stock indexes lower on Thursday as Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s results spurred worries around artificial-intelligence spending.

news.title: DeepMind CEO to Lobby Washington on Plan for Group to Vet AI Models
news.summary: Earlier this week, Google DeepMind Chief Executive Officer Demis Hassabis unveiled a proposal for a new international watchdog that would do “rigorous” tests and reviews of cutting-edge AI models before release.

news.title: DeepMind CEO Rallies Support for International Group to Vet AI Models
news.summary: Demis Hassabis intends to hold meetings about his proposal with US policymakers.

news.title: An Alien-Abduction Show Lands Among the Top 50 Podcasts in the US
news.summary: The video program has become a breakthrough hit with millions of YouTube followers and 30,000 Patreon subscribers

news.title: New Mexico Denies Gas Pipeline Permit for Oracle Data Center
news.summary: New Mexico regulators have rejected, for a second time, applications for a natural gas pipeline across state lands that would supply power systems at a planned Oracle Corp. data center project.

news.title: Palm Beach Rejects Data Center Near Trump’s Mar-a-Lago Club
news.summary: Palm Beach County commissioners rejected a proposal to build a digital infrastructure hub to house AI data centers and warehouses, voting in line with the ardent opposition from local residents.

news.title: Hollywood Sci-Fi Lot Pitched as Site to Make Real Space-Age Weapons
news.summary: Manhattan Beach Studios has been the site of filming for projects including Star Wars: The Mandalorian, a TV series about a heavily armed bounty hunter in a galaxy far, far away.

news.title: DHS Seizes 30,000 Mobile SIM Cards in Effort to Stop Phone Fraud
news.summary: US Homeland Security Investigations recently seized more than 30,000 mobile phone SIM cards from sites around the country, in an operation that the agency says dismantled infrastructure criminals used in widespread telephone fraud.

news.title: Google Gemini Launch Delayed as Tech Falls Short of Internal Goals
news.summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google is months behind schedule on delivering Gemini 3.5 Pro, its most powerful flagship AI model, because the company has been taking time to try to improve its capabilities, particularly in coding, according to people familiar with the matter.

news.title: Oracle Risks Falling Behind in AI Race as Spending Binge Bites
news.summary: Oracle Corp.’s ambitions to dominate the artificial intelligence buildout are running into a key hurdle: funding a spending spree without further damaging its credit standing.

news.title: GameStop CEO Says Physical Video-Game Sales Are ‘Irrelevant’ to Business
news.summary: GameStop Corp. Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen dismissed concerns about the demise of physical discs for video games, insisting that those sales make up a small part of the company’s overall business and reiterating that his long-term strategy is to focus on gaming collectables and purchasing e-commerce giant eBay Inc.

news.title: Digi Spanish Unit Shares Close Lower After €287 Million IPO
news.summary: Digi Spain Telecom SA shares closed lower in their debut in Spain on Thursday, after a rare initial public offering in the country.

news.title: Ryan Cohen Vows GameStop Will Pursue eBay Despite Offer Being Rebuffed
news.summary: GameStop Corp. Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen declined to say if he planned to raise his $56 billion offer for online auctioneer eBay Inc., but said “we’re coming for eBay one way or another.”

news.title: Verizon Cuts Store Workers in Reorganization Strategy
news.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. announced a round of layoffs Thursday that will impact about 3,000 employees in corporate-owned retail stores, the latest move in new Chief Executive Officer Dan Schulman’s plan to transform the mobile provider.

news.title: Carney Taps General Dynamics for $1.4 Billion Canada Armored Vehicle Deal
news.summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney announced the Canadian government is earmarking C$2 billion ($1.4 billion) over four years to build armored combat support vehicles in southwestern Ontario.

news.title: Visa Is Expanding Its Crypto Push With New Stablecoin Platform
news.summary: Visa Inc. unveiled a platform that lets financial firms issue, move and manage stablecoins, broadening the payments giant’s crypto offerings as banks and fintechs prepare for wider adoption of the digital tokens.

news.title: China-Led AI Body Enlists Global South States to Rival US
news.summary: Twenty-nine countries including Russia have signed up to join the China-led World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization, as Beijing’s plan to jostle with the US for influence over the emergence of artificial intelligence begins to take shape.

news.title: Sea Drone Maker Saronic to Build New Shipyard in South Texas
news.summary: An Austin-based technology startup whose maritime drones were used by the US military in combat for the first time this week plans to build a $3.2 billion shipyard in South Texas.

news.title: Apple Nears Launch of OLED iPad Mini; New iPad Air and Base iPad in 2027
news.summary: Apple Inc. is preparing to introduce its biggest overhaul to the iPad mini in half a decade, giving new life to a product that’s popular with travelers and technology enthusiasts.

news.title: Coca-Cola suspended production at its Fairlife dairy after a ransomware attack
news.summary: Coca Cola said dairy production at its Fairlife unit will "remain suspended" in the United States following a hack.

news.title: Founders Fund hires former OpenAI exec Ryan Beiermeister (and not because of her ‘Mafia’ skills)
news.summary: Ryan Beiermeister, who demonstrated cool analysis in the Founders Fund YouTube series "Mafia," has joined the firm as a partner.

news.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
news.summary: Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from prompts and reference images.

news.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
news.summary: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.

news.title: Oil giant BP shutters its corporate venture arm after 20 years
news.summary: BP Ventures is shutting down, ending a nearly 20-year run that was marked by reportedly lackluster returns.

news.title: Uber’s $14.8B Delivery Hero deal would nearly double its global footprint
news.summary: Uber has agreed to acquire Delivery Hero in a $14.8 billion all-stock deal that would nearly double the company’s global footprint and create one of the world’s largest food-delivery platforms outside China.

news.title: Newsletter platform Beehiiv now lets subscribers chat with each other, adds AI
news.summary: Beehiiv is launching an AI Copilot to help publishers with user growth and analytics.

news.title: X cracks down on creators who steal content
news.summary: X will use Grok AI to better detect stolen content, redirect payouts to original creators, and crack down on engagement bait.

news.title: AI-powered travel agency Fora hits unicorn status, raises $60M
news.summary: Travel agency Fora announced a $60 million Series D round led by Forerunner and Tactile Ventures, valuing the company at $1 billion.

news.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
news.summary: With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.

news.title: Google continues its renaming streak by turning NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook
news.summary: Google said users can soon access their notebooks through AI Mode in Search.

news.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
news.summary: DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward software designed for AI agents instead of just humans.

news.title: UK cops say arrest of two young hackers disrupted the operations of an infamous hacking group
news.summary: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair, two members of the prolific Scattered Spider hacking group, pleaded guilty and were sentenced to five years and six months in jail for hacking London’s metropolitan transit system.

news.title: Period tracker Stardust shares users’ health data with analytics firm, says Mozilla research
news.summary: One period tracker app tested by Mozilla was 'squeaky clean,' while another app was seen sharing users' health data with an analytics company, underscoring vast differences in user privacy among these apps.

news.title: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?
news.summary: You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.

news.title: How a former DeepMind researcher raised at a $300M pre-seed valuation before launching a product
news.summary: Drawing on more than a decade spent helping build some of the world's most influential AI systems, including research that later informed the development of ChatGPT, Andrew Dai explains why he believes visual AI is one of the next major frontiers in artificial intelligence.

news.title: Sheryl Sandberg leads $10 million investment in AI-powered vehicle inspection service
news.summary: The startup, founded in 2021, lets enterprise customers use smartphones to scan and spot vehicle damage.

news.title: Why AMI Labs’ Alexandre LeBrun won’t call his AI ‘AGI’ or ‘superintelligence’
news.summary: While everyone in AI is chasing "superintelligence," Alexandre LeBrun, CEO of Yann LeCun’s world model startup, AMI Labs, dismisses the word.

news.title: Moonshot’s upcoming Kimi 3 is expected to close the gap with Anthropic’s Opus 4.8
news.summary: The FT reports Kimi K3 will be the largest open AI model from China, with a parameter count between 2 trillion and 3 trillion.

news.title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba and Baidu
news.summary: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.

news.title: Fortnite is getting a bunch of AI-powered ‘personas’
news.summary: Get ready for more AI characters in Fortnite. Developer Epic Games is going to let Fortnite creators publish experiences featuring characters with AI-powered voices starting on July 30th, and ahead of that launch, it's created 36 characters with "consistent voices and personas" that creators can use as NPCs. The characters include Fortnite staples like Agent […]

news.title: Samsung’s 55-inch Frame art TV is $200 cheaper than usual
news.summary: Samsung’s Frame is different from your average 4K TV. Its biggest selling point involves what it does when you aren’t actively using it. It can display art, turning your living room into a gallery. The Frame has bezels that make it look like — you guessed it — framed art, and its matte finish can […]

news.title: Netflix says around 300 titles used generative AI
news.summary: Netflix says roughly 300 titles on its platform used generative AI, most of which occurred in post-production. The streaming service revealed the news in its second-quarter earnings report released on Thursday, saying it's "increasingly leveraging these tools to deliver higher quality output more quickly and at a lower cost." It also provided some examples of […]

news.title: Why are people buying so many CDs?
news.summary: CD sales are apparently going up, reportedly thanks to fans realizing they're an affordable way to support their favorite artists. According to a new report from research firm Luminate, 16.3 million CDs were sold in the first half of 2026 in the US, a 16 percent increase year-over-year. The growth in CD sales was driven […]

news.title: Kalshi says it caught Trump’s teleprompter operator insider trading
news.summary: Kalshi users betting on what President Donald Trump would say during his speeches were reportedly up against tough competition: the president's teleprompter operator. ABC News reports that federal investigators believe Gabriel Perez - Trump's teleprompter operator since 2016 - used inside information to make bets on Kalshi, a major prediction market platform that allows users […]

news.title: New York governor says she’s using AI to analyze ‘every single rule’ in the state
news.summary: New York Governor Kathy Hochul might have just signed a moratorium on new AI data centers in the state, but she's not against using the technology herself. During an interview with Bloomberg's Odd Lots podcast, Hochul said that her team is using "AI to analyze every single rule, regulation, [and] policy" to check for outdated […]

news.title: Ecovacs’ self-cleaning Deebot X11 has hit a new low price
news.summary: Sometimes it feels like keeping your floors clean is one of those never-ending chores, which is why it's nice to have a versatile robot vacuum take it off your hands. The Ecovacs Deebot X11 robovac / mop hybrid is designed to do just that, and it's now $699 ($400 off) at Amazon and directly from […]

news.title: Google is better than Apple at playing the AI regulations game
news.summary: Today, the European Union ordered Google to give its AI rivals greater access to Android, the open-source operating system that powers billions of devices worldwide. The demand is hardly surprising. It may look like a defeat on paper for Google, which has spent years resisting exactly this kind of access, but it is a regulatory […]

news.title: Roblox will let people use AI to make games on their phone
news.summary: Roblox is about to let people make games with AI right inside its mobile app, which could make a platform that's already filled with content of questionable quality feel even more overloaded. The company has embraced AI with open arms, including a preview of an ambitious take on AI world models similar to Google's Project […]

news.title: Google is renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook
news.summary: Google is giving its AI note-taking app a new name. The company announced on Thursday that NotebookLM is becoming Gemini Notebook, but will remain a standalone app even as it integrates more deeply across Gemini and Google Search. Google first revealed Gemini Notebook - then called Project Tailwind - in May 2023 before widely releasing […]

AAPL.fact_check: 애플의 AI 파트너십은 공식적으로 확인된 사실이며, 중국 시장에서의 AI 진출은 중요한 전략적 움직임입니다. 그러나 AI 규제 관련 뉴스는 과장된 측면이 있어, 실제 영향은 제한적일 수 있습니다.
AAPL.sentiment_reason: 애플의 AI 파트너십 뉴스는 긍정적이지만, Fear & Greed 지수와 Stocktwits의 중립적 반응을 고려했습니다.
AAPL.key_insight: 애플은 AI 분야에서 중국의 주요 기업들과 협력하여 시장 점유율을 확대하려고 합니다. 이는 장기적으로 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있지만, 단기적인 주가 변동성은 여전히 존재합니다. 투자자들은 이러한 변화를 주의 깊게 관찰해야 합니다.
AAPL.recommendation_reason: 현재 주가는 목표가를 상회하고 있어 추가 상승 여력이 제한적입니다.
AAPL.summary_one_line: 애플의 AI 파트너십은 긍정적이나, 현재 주가는 목표가를 초과하여 관망이 필요합니다.

MSFT.fact_check: 현재 시장 데이터와 뉴스 분석 결과, Microsoft의 주가는 긍정적인 투자 의견을 받고 있으며, 분석가들의 목표가도 높게 설정되어 있습니다. Fear & Greed 지수는 낮지만, 이는 시장 전반의 불안감으로 인한 것이며, Microsoft 자체의 문제는 아닙니다.
MSFT.sentiment_reason: Microsoft에 대한 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 높은 목표가로 인해 긍정적인 심리가 우세합니다.
MSFT.key_insight: Microsoft는 현재 높은 시가총액과 긍정적인 분석가 의견을 바탕으로 안정적인 성장세를 보이고 있습니다. Fear & Greed 지수가 낮아 시장 전반의 불안감이 있지만, 이는 Microsoft의 펀더멘털과는 무관합니다. 투자자들은 장기적인 관점에서 긍정적인 성과를 기대할 수 있습니다.
MSFT.recommendation_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 높은 목표가로 인해 매수 추천이 적합합니다.
MSFT.summary_one_line: Microsoft는 긍정적인 분석가 의견과 높은 목표가로 인해 매수 기회로 평가됩니다.

GOOGL.fact_check: Gemini 3.5 Pro AI 모델의 출시 지연은 공식적으로 확인되었으며, 이는 기술적 개선을 위한 조치로 보입니다. 일부 헤드라인은 과장된 측면이 있으나, 전반적으로 사실에 기반하고 있습니다.
GOOGL.sentiment_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 긍정적인 목표가에도 불구하고, AI 모델 출시 지연과 시장의 두려움 지수로 인해 중립 이상의 긍정적 심리가 형성되었습니다.
GOOGL.key_insight: Alphabet의 AI 모델 출시 지연은 단기적으로 주가에 부정적 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다. 그러나 장기적으로는 기술 개선이 이루어질 경우 긍정적 결과를 기대할 수 있습니다. 시장의 두려움 지수가 높아진 상황에서 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.
GOOGL.recommendation_reason: AI 모델 출시 지연과 시장의 두려움 지수를 고려할 때, 당분간 관망하는 것이 바람직합니다.
risk_factors: AI 모델 출시 지연으로 인한 기술 경쟁력 저하
GOOGL.summary_one_line: Alphabet의 AI 모델 출시 지연에도 불구하고 장기적 성장 가능성을 주목해야 합니다.

AMZN.fact_check: AMZN의 8-K 공시는 공식 확인된 사실이며, 다른 뉴스는 AMZN과 직접적인 관련이 없습니다.
AMZN.sentiment_reason: 분석가의 강력 매수 추천과 긍정적인 목표가가 긍정적 심리를 형성하나, Fear & Greed 지수는 약간의 두려움을 나타냅니다.
AMZN.key_insight: 아마존의 주가는 현재 목표가보다 낮아 매수 기회로 보입니다. 분석가들은 강력 매수를 추천하고 있으며, 이는 긍정적인 투자 심리를 반영합니다. 그러나 시장의 두려움 지수는 주의가 필요함을 시사합니다.
AMZN.recommendation_reason: 분석가의 강력 매수 추천과 현재 주가가 목표가보다 낮기 때문입니다.
AMZN.summary_one_line: 아마존 주식은 현재 목표가보다 낮아 매수 기회로 보입니다.

NVDA.fact_check: Nvidia의 새로운 AI 모델 발표와 일본 내 AI 생태계 확장은 공식 확인된 사실이며, Fireworks의 가치 상승은 과장된 부분이 있을 수 있습니다.
NVDA.sentiment_reason: Nvidia의 AI 모델 확장 뉴스는 긍정적이지만, 시장의 두려움 지수와 주가 하락이 부정적 영향을 미쳤습니다.
NVDA.key_insight: Nvidia는 AI 기술 확장으로 미래 성장 가능성을 보여주고 있습니다. 그러나 현재 시장의 불안감과 주가 하락은 단기적인 투자에 주의가 필요합니다. 장기적으로는 AI 분야에서의 강력한 입지가 긍정적입니다.
NVDA.recommendation_reason: 현재 시장의 불안감과 주가 하락을 고려할 때 관망이 적절합니다.
NVDA.summary_one_line: Nvidia의 AI 확장은 긍정적이지만, 시장 불안감 속에서 관망이 필요합니다.

META.fact_check: 현재 시장 데이터와 뉴스 분석 결과, Meta Platforms의 주가는 최근 하락세를 보이고 있지만, 분석가들의 목표가는 여전히 높게 설정되어 있습니다. Fear & Greed 지수는 '공포' 상태를 나타내고 있어 투자자들이 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.
META.sentiment_reason: 분석가들의 강력한 매수 추천과 높은 목표가에도 불구하고, 시장의 공포 심리와 주가 하락이 혼재되어 있어 긍정적이지만 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.
META.key_insight: Meta Platforms의 주가는 최근 하락했지만, 분석가들은 여전히 높은 목표가를 제시하고 있습니다. 이는 장기적으로 긍정적인 전망을 시사하지만, 현재 시장의 공포 심리를 고려할 때 단기적인 변동성에 주의해야 합니다. 투자자들은 장기적인 성장 가능성을 염두에 두고 신중하게 접근하는 것이 중요합니다.
META.recommendation_reason: 시장의 공포 심리와 주가 하락을 고려할 때, 현재는 관망이 적절합니다.
META.summary_one_line: Meta Platforms는 장기적인 성장 가능성이 높지만, 현재 시장의 공포 심리를 고려해 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.

TSLA.fact_check: Elon Musk의 AI 관련 사업 확장이 과장되었을 수 있으나, 공식적으로는 데이터 센터 관련 정책 제안이 진행 중임. Tesla의 주가 하락은 Netflix의 실적 불안과는 무관함.
TSLA.sentiment_reason: Tesla에 대한 분석가의 매수 추천과 목표가가 긍정적이나, 시장의 두려움 지수가 높아 신중한 접근 필요.
TSLA.key_insight: Tesla의 주가는 현재 시장의 두려움에도 불구하고 분석가들의 긍정적 전망에 의해 지지받고 있습니다. AI와 관련된 사업 확장이 Tesla의 미래 성장 가능성을 높일 수 있습니다. 그러나 시장의 불확실성이 여전히 존재하므로 주의가 필요합니다.
TSLA.recommendation_reason: 시장 불확실성이 존재하나, 장기적으로 긍정적인 요소가 많아 관망이 적절함.
risk_factors: AI 관련 사업 확장에 따른 규제 리스크
TSLA.summary_one_line: Tesla는 긍정적 전망에도 불구하고 시장 불확실성으로 인해 관망이 필요합니다.

market_summary.market_summary: 오늘 시장은 전반적으로 혼조세를 보이고 있으며, 투자자들은 AI 관련 기업들의 장기적인 성장 가능성에 주목하고 있습니다. 그러나 현재 시장의 불확실성과 공포 심리가 여전히 존재합니다.
market_summary.top_mover_reason: Microsoft는 긍정적인 분석가 의견과 높은 목표가로 인해 매수 기회로 평가됩니다.
market_summary.today_strategy: 투자자들은 신중하게 접근하며, 긍정적인 전망을 가진 기업에 대한 매수 기회를 탐색해야 합니다. 특히, 목표가보다 낮은 주식에 주목하면서도 시장의 불확실성을 고려한 관망 자세를 유지하는 것이 중요합니다.

daily_insights.Topic_Title: AI 모델 검증 국제 기구 설립 제안과 그 파급 효과
daily_insights.Full_Summary: DeepMind의 CEO Demis Hassabis가 AI 모델의 안전성과 신뢰성을 높이기 위한 국제 기구 설립을 제안하며 워싱턴에서 지지를 모으고 있다. 이 제안은 AI 기술의 급속한 발전과 그에 따른 규제 필요성을 반영하며, 글로벌 AI 산업에 큰 영향을 미칠 수 있다. 특히, AI 기술을 선도하는 기업들에게는 규제 강화와 신뢰성 확보라는 두 가지 과제를 동시에 안겨줄 것으로 보인다.
daily_insights.AI_Impact_Reason: AI 모델 검증 기구 설립 제안은 기술 신뢰성을 높이는 긍정적 효과를 가져올 수 있지만, 규제 강화로 인한 단기적인 비용 증가 가능성도 있어 M7 기업 주가에 중립적에서 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상됩니다.
